name: Ashwood Glen
description: A blackened woodland where ash falls without wind. The roots remember fire, and the stones remember screams.

tiles.name: Ashwood Entry
tiles.description: The Elder Road gives way to black root and drifting ash.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: A narrow trail cuts through soot and brittle leaves.

tiles.name: Cinder Cache
tiles.description: A scorched field cache is wedged beneath a fallen trunk.

tiles.name: Charred Bend
tiles.description: The path bends around trees split by old heat.

tiles.name: Smoke Shrine
tiles.description: A low shrine exhales smoke that smells faintly of rain.

tiles.name: Old Roots
tiles.description: Dead roots curl across the path like blackened fingers.

tiles.name: Ember Wisp
tiles.description: A guttering spirit flickers between two hollow trees.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: Your boots leave pale marks in the soot.

tiles.name: Burning Thorn
tiles.description: Thorn-vines burn without consuming themselves.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: The air shivers above the burned road.

tiles.name: Hollow Log
tiles.description: A split log shelters a pocket of cool shadow.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: The trail continues under a gray canopy.

tiles.name: Cinder Pool
tiles.description: A dark pool bubbles with failed fire instead of water.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: The path widens near scattered stones.

tiles.name: Glassroot
tiles.description: Roots hardened into glass catch dim emberlight.

tiles.name: Ash Wolf Den
tiles.description: A wolf with ash-caked fur watches from a dug-out hollow.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: The ash grows deeper toward the glen's heart.

tiles.name: Cinder Acolyte
tiles.description: A fire-marked zealot kneels among cracked stones.

tiles.name: Broken Cairn
tiles.description: A cairn of black stones has been split from within.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: A final stretch of road points toward a pulsing glow.

tiles.name: Return Road
tiles.description: The path back to the Elder Stone is still open.

transition.label: Return to Elder Road
transition.message: You return through the ash to the Elder Stone.

tiles.name: Ash Path
tiles.description: Soot drifts across the path in slow spirals.

tiles.name: Blackened Grove
tiles.description: The trees stand in a circle as if listening.

tiles.name: Ash Gate
tiles.description: A sealed path waits beyond the glen, too cold to open yet.

tiles.name: Cinderheart
tiles.description: A coal-red heart beats inside a cage of dead roots.
